messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences. Watch for tickets that are polite on the surface but negative underneath, and for ambiguous categories — escalate (needs_human=true) when unsure.

Subject: Thanks for a lovely product — quick pricing question

First of all, the team genuinely enjoys Driftwood, great work! With the recent price change our finance team asked us to re-evaluate tools for next quarter, and we're currently comparing alternatives. If annual pricing with a discount existed, that conversation would probably go away. Could you share what's possible?

response.content: {"category":"billing","priority":"medium","sentiment":"negative","needs_human":true,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about billing — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
